name: Inbox Agent
blurb: Reads every inbound inquiry, classifies it, and drafts a response in Andrew's voice. Trained on 3+ years of sent email. Morning brief surfaces leads with action items. Nothing slips.

name: Lead Score Agent
blurb: Scores every inquiry across 13 weighted signals — event proximity, guest count, upsell potential, repeat-client flags, price sensitivity. Hot leads surface before you even open Gmail.

name: Design Request Pipeline
blurb: End-to-end design intake. Scans email for brand assets, builds a structured brief, links to Drive, and queues it for the creative team — no back-and-forth needed.

name: Post-Event Pipeline
blurb: Day after every event, auto-downloads the media archive, uploads to Drive, updates the project record with gallery links and stats, and drafts the thank-you email. Zero manual steps.

name: Snappic Microsite Builder
blurb: Generates custom CSS for the Snappic guest gallery on a per-event basis. Color-matches the event's design package. Clients open a branded experience, not a generic URL.

name: SEO Agent
blurb: Monitors ranking positions for photo booth rental keywords across DFW markets. Surfaces drops and competitor gains before they compound. Built the page-1 position at mightyphotobooths.com with zero paid ads.

name: Competitor Intel Engine
blurb: Passive OSINT on every area competitor. Tracks pricing, venue relationships, social velocity, and GBP signals. Color-coded service-area map. No more flying blind on local competition.

name: W9 Generator
blurb: Generates a pre-filled W9 request package for any vendor or subcontractor. Signs it, attaches it, and drops it into the right Drive folder.

name: Blog Agent
blurb: Researches, outlines, writes, and formats SEO-optimized articles for the photo booth industry. Generates matched cover images. Publishes to Notion on a schedule.

name: Morning Brief
blurb: Daily 06:00 intelligence report: new leads ranked by score, overdue tasks, upcoming events, Snappic anomalies, and one priority action. Lands in Slack before coffee is done.

name: Event Details Builder
blurb: Pulls CRM data and builds a fully-structured Notion Event Details page — timeline, venue logistics, equipment list, design brief, staff assignments — in one shot.

name: Jimbo — AI Orchestrator
blurb: The master dispatcher. Routes tasks to the right agent, manages memory across 39 agents, and runs overnight missions without supervision. 22 active missions. 24/7.
